statement: This record remains negative evidence on build 26100: the repo did not produce enough supporting proof to promote it into a normal actionable surface.
gating_reason: Archived audit trail only. Keep this out of the normal tweak surface.

links.title: Microsoft Learn: What is Modern Standby
links.summary: Microsoft documents Modern Standby and states that switching between S3 and Modern Standby is not supported in Windows without a complete OS reinstall.

links.title: Former app implementation
links.summary: The older app implementation wrote MSDisabled = 1 and ModernSleep\EnabledActions = 0 before the tweak was removed from the live surface.

links.title: nohuto power trace for MSDisabled
links.summary: Power.txt lists MSDisabled in the power values block, showing the same local registry family used by the current app implementation.

links.title: Repo power notes
links.summary: The repo tracks these registry values as power research, but this review did not promote them to a supported Microsoft transition mechanism.
